title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit**
*None*
The climactic final battles in The Lord of The Rings come alive on a epic board.
![The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_f9e572dd.jpg)

2. **Star Wars: The Queen's Gambit**
*2000*
Recreate the climactic scenes from Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace.
![Star Wars: The Queen's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_a8c99e0f.jpg)

3. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_df40a6a2.jpg)

4. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_15e3900c.jpg)

5. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_d7b679d7.png)

6. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_417b139e.jpg)

7. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_9068692a.jpg)

8. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_bf99a03b.png)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_9fadf1a2.jpg)

10. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_1e195915.png)

11. **Grimcoven**
*2025*
Boss battler game set in a dark Victorian universe.
![Grimcoven](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_4da845bd.png)

12. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_680c9455.jpg)

13. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_3a66c38c.jpg)

14. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_f9a2dc02.jpg)

15. **Voidfall**
*2023*
Repel the Voidborn and restore Domineum in this space themed, heavy Euro.
![Voidfall](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_37fc3299.jpg)

16. **Phantom Epoch**
*2025*
Travel the galaxy in the footsteps of the Vanished to defeat an ancient enemy.
![Phantom Epoch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_d8ef5c38.jpg)

17. **IKI**
*2015*
Hire artisans, set them up in the market and acquire prestige in feudal Japan.
![IKI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_5b0ab0a1.png)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_c1497d8d.png)

19. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2016*
Investigate the horrors of Arkham while courting cosmic doom.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_dbebcedf.jpg)

20. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_ba048744.jpg)

21. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_fab8e4f3.jpg)

22. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_ebe9607b.jpg)

23. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_8fe74ed6.jpg)

24. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_5f35a98c.jpg)

25. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_5a1ca808.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*14 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_6a2a724f.jpg)

2. **Wingspan**
*86 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_c277052b.jpg)

3. **Harmonies**
*22 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_cba7e671.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*17 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_5a193621.jpg)

5. **Ark Nova**
*50 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_f52f6d74.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*10 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_d68ac508.png)

7. **Azul**
*100 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_bf48a0c5.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*113 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_3f5f813b.jpg)

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*39 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_1c00c819.jpg)

10. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*62 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_8b741f86.jpg)

11. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*32 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_018ff405.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*29 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_3f48d358.jpg)

13. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*15 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_794effa4.jpg)

14. **Cascadia**
*55 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_7a7ab764.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*29 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_722e231f.jpg)

16. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*8 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_ff448210.jpg)

17. **Faraway**
*22 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_94c48a38.png)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*1 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_604a9c12.png)

19. **The Gang**
*8 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_a1fe2b72.jpg)

20. **Carcassonne**
*272 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_5554a07e.jpg)

21. **Toy Battle**
*1 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_724dd7fd.jpg)

22. **The White Castle**
*28 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_f8199846.jpg)

23. **Splendor**
*142 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_9eb2ac55.jpg)

24. **Take Time**
*3 months on the list*
Time beckons you to discover a multitude of challenging universes.
![Take Time](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_7be60075.png)

25. **Agent Avenue**
*2 months on the list*
Retired spies in a suburban neighborhood race to discover each other's secrets.
![Agent Avenue](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-01/toplist/bgg_f6b6f3c8.jpg)
